title: suregada boiviniana var. meridionalis
intro: Suregada boiviniana var. meridionalis, also known as a variant of the Suregada boiviniana plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Suregada boiviniana var. meridionalis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against cell damage. The herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by extracting its leaves and roots, which can be used in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules.
